privileged_info_summary: All test patients have correctly categorized NIRs according to French INSEE Modulo 97 validation rules. VALID cases (AUBERT, BEAUMONT, CHEVALIER) have correct 15-digit NIRs with accurate control keys matching the formula 97 - (first 13 digits modulo 97). INVALID_FORMAT cases (DUFOUR: 5 digits, FABRE: contains non-numeric characters) violate the 15-digit numeric requirement. INVALID_KEY cases (GARNIER: key 40 vs correct 39, HUBERT: key 14 vs correct 13) have correct format but incorrect control keys. JOUBERT has empty NIR (MISSING). The validation test data is synthetic but constructed according to actual French NIR standards defined by INSEE.
